programOverview.heading: Program Overview
programOverview.subheading: Engineering the Future, Building the Nation
programOverview.text:
At Bulacan State University, the Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering is more than a degree—it is a commitment to engineering the backbone of society. Our program is a rigorous journey that fuses deep theoretical understanding with the practical demands of a rapidly evolving global landscape.

From the intricacies of structural design to the challenges of sustainable water resource management, our students are immersed in an environment that prizes innovation, precision, and resilience. We leverage state-of-the-art technology and real-world field experiences to ensure our engineers are prepared for the complexities of the 21st century.

Rooted in a legacy of service and excellence, we produce professionals who are not just experts in their field, but ethical leaders dedicated to building a stronger, more sustainable nation.

licensureExam.title: Licensure Examination for Civil Engineers (CELE)
licensureExam.subtitle: Consistently delivering high performance in professional licensure examinations.

peo.title: Program Educational Objectives
peo.subtitle: The graduates of the Civil Engineering program are expected to achieve the following within a few years of graduation:
bullets: Demonstrate proficiency in the application of civil engineering principles to solve complex engineering problems.
Exhibit leadership and professionalism in their chosen career paths.
Engage in lifelong learning and professional development to keep pace with the advancements in the field.

so.title: Student Outcomes
so.subtitle: By the time of graduation, the students of the Civil Engineering program shall have the ability to:

outcomes.title: SO 1
outcomes.text: Apply knowledge of mathematics, science, and engineering fundamentals.

outcomes.title: SO 2
outcomes.text: Design and conduct experiments, as well as analyze and interpret data.

outcomes.title: SO 3
outcomes.text: Design a system, component, or process to meet desired needs within realistic constraints.

outcomes.title: SO 5
outcomes.text: Identify, formulate, and solve engineering problems.

curriculumOverview.title: Curriculum Overview
curriculumOverview.text: Our curriculum is structured to provide a balance between theoretical knowledge and practical application. It includes core engineering courses, specialized electives, and hands-on laboratory experiences.
bullets: Strong foundation in Mathematics and Basic Sciences
Integration of Design and Research Projects

laboratories.title: Laboratories
laboratories.description: Empowering students through advanced experimental learning and cutting-edge research environments.
